Items.Key: off-by-one in safe_string_copy|off-by-one error|cwe-193|medium|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|200|206|string_utils::safe_string_copy|if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|when src_len equals dest_size, the null terminator is written one byte past the buffer, causing heap/stack corruption.|copy a string whose length is exactly equal to dest_size.|limit src_len to dest_size - 1 to reserve space for the null terminator.->off-by-one in safe_string_copy|off-by-one error|cwe-193|medium|1|enhanced_calc.cpp|200|206|string_utils::safe_string_copy|if (src_len > dest_size) src_len = dest_size; memcpy(dest, src, src_len); dest[src_len] = '\0';|when src_len equals dest_size, the null terminator is written one byte past the buffer, causing heap/stack corruption.|copy a string whose length is exactly equal to dest_size.|limit src_len to dest_size - 1 to reserve space for the null terminator.

truthAudit.Summary: Audit of Run 2 against the 20 true vulnerabilities. Run 2 correctly identified 6 vulnerabilities fully or partially, missed 13, and introduced 1 false positive not in the ground truth. Severity and CWE mappings for some findings required correction.

Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability in log_debug_message with exact code match and CWE-134.
Run 2 did not mention integer overflow in the factorial function.
Run 2 did not identify the use-after-free in memory pool cleanup.
Run 2 found a command injection (CWE-78) but in the admin exec handler rather than the config validation path specified in the ground truth.
Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression with exact code match.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: long long old_value = value_; std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mutex_); value_ = old_value + 1;
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter with exact code match.
Run 2 did not identify the logic bomb in authentication bypass.
Run 2 did not identify path traversal in config loading.
Run 2 identified a buffer overflow in ExpressionParser but labeled it CWE-120 instead of CWE-122 (Heap Overflow), though the underlying issue matches.
Run 2 correctly identified hardcoded credentials with exact match.
Run 2 correctly identified weak PRNG for session tokens, though used CWE-330 instead of CWE-338.
Run 2 did not identify thread-unsafe timestamp cache.
Run 2 did not identify insecure temporary file handling.
Run 2 did not identify persistent authentication state.
Run 2 did not identify unhandled exception in variable parsing.
Run 2 did not identify integer underflow in memory pool split.
Run 2 did not identify unbounded recursion in parser.
Run 2 did not identify data race in result cache.
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU in config loading.
Run 2 did not identify integer division by zero in command routing.
